common: A Crystalline Compound Derivable from Indigo, but also a product of Putrefaction of Proteids (INDOL)

head.text: Dull occipital and frontal headache in afternoon. Dull sensation over eyes. Eyeballs hot and hurt when moved. Pupils dilated with headache

stomach_abdomen.text: Bloated feeling. Hungry sensation after full meal. Great thirst. Constipation

extremities.text: Very tired and sore in lower limbs. Feet burn. Knee-joints sore

keynotes.text: color="#800000">INDOLUM A Crystalline Compound Derivable from Indigo, but also a product of Putrefaction of Proteids (INDOL) Primary action is to increase the elimination of Indican. Auto-intoxication. Compare: Skatol. Persistent desire to sleep, dull, discontented mental state, hideous, delusions and nervousness, constant motion of fingers and feet. Intestinal putrefaction.
